manifest.description: Signed demo CURD tool plugin package

tool.agent_usage: Send one JSON object on stdin and consume one JSON object from stdout. Use this demo tool to validate custom native tool packaging and CURD-side invocation.
tool.review_guidance: Reviewers should check argument semantics, downstream effects, and whether the tool should be callable by non-human profiles.
tool.downstream_impact: Returns derived metadata only in this sample. Replace with real side effects only after policy review.
tool.description: Reference native tool plugin for CURD extension authors.

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Input text that the tool should summarize.
